description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic (and eastern Arabic numerals). Dated: 5582 AM = 1821/22 CE. Headed: "The expenses (maṣrūf) of the Sephardic [congregation] מצות in Fustat/Cairo for the year 5582." Many names familiar from other Geniza documents of the period feature in this list. Some entries begin with "סוגיירת" (young daughter?) followed by parents. The list of names includes: Ḥayyīm Kabayero (Caballero in modern Castellano), Yiṣḥaq Gabriel, Maʿatūqa bt. Av[raham] Ḥadad, David Sofer, Av[raham] Ḥadad Nūkha bt. Shemuʾel, sughayrat Yisraʾel Romano,sughayrat Ḥabīb/Ḥavīv Sofriel, Meʾī Ṣevi Qaṭan, Ḥayyīm Yarḥī[?], Aṣlan Gatenio, Shemuʾel Pint, Yosef Gershon, sughayrat Siman Tov Ḥakīm, Nofal[?] Yiṣḥaq, Sulṭana bt. Yiṣḥaq Zamruda, David Bibas, Miryam Būṣiya[?] bt. Moshe ʿAmdan, the orphan of Shemuʾel Romano, Raḥamīm b. Shelomo, Yaqūtī Yuʿbeṣ/Yaʿabeṣ. VMR. ASE. MCD.
tags: Bibas, Pinto, late prosopography, Gatenio, Romano, Yu'bas, Shim'on Frances
description_he: חשבונות בערבית-יהודית; 5582 (= 1821/22 לספירה); כותרת: 'הוצאות הספרדים מצות בפוסטאט/קהיר'; שמות רבים: חיים קבאיירו, יצחק גבריאל, מעתוקה בת אברהם חדד, דוד סופר, יעקותי יועבץ ועוד
